languages.title: Olulimi
languages.subtitle: Londa olulimi olukozesebwa mu app yonna.
languages.noResults: Tewali nnimi zikwatagana na kunoonya kwo.

phone.label: Ennamba y’essimu
phone.searchCountry: Noonya ensi, koodi, oba entandikwa y’okukuba essimu
phone.countryButton: Kyuusa ensi, mu kiseera kino %{country} kwogasse %{callingCode}
phone.invalid: Ssaamu ennamba y’essimu entuufu ey’ensi gy’olonze.

auth.onboardingTagline: Omubeezi ow’obukuumi ku bubwe mu biseera ebiri wakati wa “Ndi bulungi” ne “Nneetaaga obuyambi.”
auth.createSubtitle: Londa enkola y’okuyingira okukuuma giraafu yo ey’obukuumi.
auth.signInFailedMessage: Tetwasobodde kumaliriza kuyingira. Kebera omukago gwo era ogezeeko nate.
auth.googleUnavailableMessage: Okukozesa olutuula lw’enkulaakulana y’ekitundu. Native Google Sign-In ekola mu kuzimba enkulaakulana.
auth.northStarSubtitle: Pair kati oba genda mu maaso n’okugattako oluvannyuma.
auth.northStarBody: Eky’okwambala VL01 kisobola okuleeta okutambula kw’obukuumi nga kiriko ttaapu n’obubonero obuwanvu obw’okunyiga.
auth.meetCapybearSubtitle: Munne ow’obukuumi omukkakkamu ku maapu ne mu kuyita.
auth.capybearBody: Capybear esobola okuyamba ku mbeera y’awaka, mode y’omukuumi, mode ey’amangu, okuyita mu kwekwasa, n’okuwagira eddoboozi.

permissions.locationSubtitle: Ekozesebwa ku maapu, ebifo eby’akabi, okutuuka mu ngeri ey’obukuumi, ne SOS embeera.
permissions.locationBody: VeryLoving asaba ekifo abakuumi basobole okutegeera obuyambi we buyinza okwetaagisa. Kino osobola okukikyusa oluvannyuma mu Settings.
permissions.notificationsBody: Tukozesa okumanyisibwa kwokka ku kukubwa obukuumi, okulongoosa mu bwangu, n’okujjukiza kw’osobozesa.
permissions.locationRationaleTitle: Ekifo kikuuma embeera y’obukuumi nga ntuufu
permissions.locationRationaleMessage: VeryLoving ekozesa ekifo kyo ku maapu y’obukuumi, ebitundu eby’akabi, okugabana amangu, ne SOS embeera. Kino osobola okukikyusa oluvannyuma mu Settings.
permissions.notificationsRationaleMessage: VeryLoving esindika okujjukiza okuyingira, okutereeza mu mbeera ez’amangu, n’okukusaba obukuumi bw’osobozesa. Tetukozesa kumanyisibwa ku birango.
permissions.microphoneRationaleMessage: VeryLoving ekozesa akazindaalo ko nga otandise AI omubeezi oba okukuba essimu ey’obukuumi.
permissions.bluetoothRationaleMessage: VeryLoving ekozesa Bluetooth okugatta n’amajolobero NorthStar, okusoma embeera y’okuyungibwa, n’okutandika okukulukuta kw’obukuumi okuva mu by’okwambala.
permissions.cameraRationaleMessage: VeryLoving uses the camera only to scan the one-time pairing QR code on your home robot.

tutorial.sharedBody: VeryLoving ekuuma okutambula kuno okuva ku Settings ne dashboard.
tutorial.chooseVoiceSubtitle: Londa eddoboozi ly’omubeezi erisinga okuwulira ng’olina obukuumi okuwulira.
tutorial.homeSubtitle: Okulondoola mu kasirise olw’obukuumi bwa buli lunaku.
tutorial.emergencySubtitle: Taapu ttaano zisobola okulinnya okutuuka ku SOS n’okulabula kw’omukuumi.
tutorial.excuseSubtitle: Tonda ensonga ennungi okuva mu mbeera etali nnungi.
tutorial.safetyCallSubtitle: Tandika okukuba essimu y’omubeezi mu kiseera ekituufu nga weetaaga obuyambi.
tutorial.practiceSubtitle: Gezaako okukulukuta kw’obukuumi mu demo ya puleesa entono.

jewelry.noDevices: Tewali byuma NorthStar ebiriraanyewo bizuuliddwa n’okutuusa kati.
jewelry.scanStartFailed: Bluetooth okusika tekwasobodde kutandika. Nsaba oddemu ogezeeko.
jewelry.scanFailed: Tetwasobodde kusangayo by’okwewunda ebiriraanyewo. Kebera Bluetooth, kuuma NorthStar kumpi, era ogezeeko nate.
jewelry.scanAccessFailed: Bluetooth okusika tekwasobodde kutandika. Kebera Bluetooth access era ogezeeko nate.
jewelry.permissionDenied: Okuyingira mu kyuma ekiri okumpi kuzikiddwa. Kiriza Bluetooth okuyingira mu Settings, olwo ogezeeko nate.
jewelry.connectTimeout: NorthStar kyatwala ekiseera kiwanvu nnyo okuyunga. Kisembeze era oddemu ogezeeko.
jewelry.connectFailed: Tetwasobola kuyungibwa ku NorthStar. Kebera nti ecaajinga era eri kumpi, olwo oddemu ogezeeko.
jewelry.emptyMessage: Kuuma NorthStar ng’olina chajingi era ng’oli kumpi n’essimu eno, olwo oddemu okusika.

home.subtitle: Dashboard ekwatagana n’obukuumi
home.readyBody: Eddoboozi, maapu, eby’okwewunda, n’abakuumi biri ku ttaapu emu.

map.title: Maapu y’obukuumi
map.previewSubtitle: Expo Go okusooka; Mapbox ekola mu kuzimba enkulaakulana.
map.updateFailed: Tetusobodde kulongoosa kifo kyo. Nsaba oddemu ogezeeko.
map.notRequested: Okuyingira mu kifo tekwasabiddwa. Osobola okugisobozesa oluvannyuma okuva ku Settings.
map.permissionOff: Okuyingira mu kifo kuggaddwa. Kisobozesa mu Settings okuteeka maapu y’obukuumi wakati ku ggwe.
map.timeout: Ekifo kyo kitwala ekiseera ekiwanvu okusinga bwe kyali kisuubirwa. Tambula awalala ng’olina akabonero akatangaavu era oddemu ogezeeko.
map.savedEmptyMessage: Ebifo ebyesigika by’otereka bijja kulabika wano okusobola okubifuna amangu.
map.geofenceEntered: You entered the %{radius}m saved-place safety zone.
map.geofenceExited: You left the %{radius}m saved-place safety zone.

safetyCall.emptyMessage: Tandika essimu oba wandiika obubaka nga weetegese.

history.clearMessage: Kino kiggyawo obubaka AI obubeezi obuterekeddwa okuva ku kyuma kino.
history.title: Ebyafaayo by’emboozi
history.subtitle: AI obubaka obw’omukwano obuterekeddwa ku kyuma kino.
history.emptyMessage: Emboozi AI munno zijja kulabika wano oluvannyuma lw’okukubira essimu yo esooka.
history.loadFailed: Tetwasobola kutikka byafaayo bya mboozi. Nsaba oddemu ogezeeko.
history.clearFailed: Tetwasobola kulongoosa byafaayo bya mboozi. Nsaba oddemu ogezeeko.
history.deleteFailed: Tetwasobola kusazaamu mboozi eyo. Nsaba oddemu ogezeeko.

voices.title: Amaloboozi gange ag’okuyita mu by’okwerinda
voices.subtitle: Londa eddoboozi ly’omubeezi eriwulira nga lituufu okuwulira.
voices.sampleFailedMessage: Sampuli eno ey’eddoboozi teyasobodde kukubwa. Nsaba oddemu ogezeeko.

settings.offlineModeSubtitle: Kozesa eby’okuddamu by’ababeezi ebikuŋŋaanyiziddwa nga omukutu oba Hume ebiwandiiko ebikakasa tebiriiwo.
settings.privacyBody: Fuula oba okusazaamu data y’omu kitundu eterekeddwa ku kyuma kino.
settings.exportFailedMessage: Tesobola kufulumya data yo mu kiseera kino.
settings.deleteConfirmMessage: Kino kiggyawo pulofayilo yo, ensengeka, abantu b’okwatagana nabo mu bwangu, ebyafaayo by’emboozi, okujjukiza olukusa, n’olutuula lw’okukakasa mu kitundu okuva ku kyuma kino.
settings.deleteFailedMessage: Tekisoboka kusazaamu data ya wano mu kiseera kino.

sections.deviceSafetySubtitle: NorthStar, abakuumi, n’abatuukirira mu mbeera ez’amangu

settings.updateFailedMessage: Tetwasobola kutereka kwettanira okwo. Nsaba oddemu ogezeeko.
settings.signOutFailedMessage: Olusoma lwo lukyakola. Nsaba oddemu ogezeeko.

contacts.title: Abakwatagana mu mbeera ez’amangu
contacts.subtitle: Abantu abeesigika abaliwo mu biseera by’okutambula kw’obukuumi.
contacts.name: Erinnya
contacts.empty: Tewali muntu wa mangu ayongerwako n’okutuusa kati.
contacts.emptyTitle: Tewali muntu yenna akwatagana na mangu
contacts.emptyMessage: Yongerako omuntu gwe weesiga abeere mwetegefu ng’omugga gw’obukuumi gwetaaga.
contacts.removeMessage: Omuntu ono tajja kuddamu kulabika mu flow yo ey’amangu.
contacts.saveFailedMessage: Tetwasobola kutereka kukwatagana kuno. Kebera ebikwata ku nsonga eno oddemu ogezeeko.
contacts.removeFailedMessage: Tetwasobola kuggyawo kukwatagana kuno. Nsaba oddemu ogezeeko.

friends.title: Mikwano gyaffe
friends.subtitle: Abakuumi, okusaba, ne giraafu y’embeera ez’amangu.
friends.emptyTitle: Enkulungo yo ey’obukuumi terimu kintu kyonna
friends.emptyMessage: Mikwano n’abakuumi abeesigika bajja kulabika wano nga bamaze okugattibwako.

emergency.title: Eby’amangu SOS
emergency.subtitle: Escalate yokka nga weetaaga obuyambi obw’amangu.
emergency.body: Kino kijja kutegeeza enkola yo ey’obukuumi n’okuteekateeka abantu b’okwatagana nabo mu bwangu.
emergency.addContact: Ongerako omuntu gw’okwatagana naye mu bwangu mu Settings.
emergency.quickShareMessage: Ekitundu ky’okugabana ebifo kyetegefu. Gatta backend share endpoint okusindika live links.

capybearTap.title: Capybear ttaapu
capybearTap.subtitle: Kuba emirundi ebiri NorthStar yo okusuula emicungwa egy’obukuumi.
capybearTap.body: Ekkubo ly’obubonero (Gesture route) lyetegefu okukola waya z’omukolo gwa BLE.

errors.voiceOffline: Olabika nga tolina mukutu. Obubaka bwo bujja kusindikibwa nga ozzeemu okuyungibwa.
errors.voiceQueued: Obubaka buterekeddwa. Kijja kusindikibwa nga munne ow’eddoboozi azzeemu okuyungibwa.
errors.microphone: Okukozesa microphone kwetaagibwa okukuba essimu mu ddoboozi. Osobola okugisobozesa mu Settings, oba okuwandiika obubaka mu kifo ky'ekyo.
errors.billing: Omubeezi w’eddoboozi ku yintaneeti tasobola kubeerawo okumala akaseera. Osobola okugenda mu maaso ne munno atali ku mukutu.
errors.authentication: Omubeezi w’eddoboozi teyasobola kukakasa lutuula luno. Ddamu oyingire oba kozesa munno atali ku mukutu kati.
errors.timeout: Munne ow’eddoboozi yatwala ekiseera kiwanvu nnyo okuddamu. Kebera omukago gwo era ogezeeko nate.
errors.network: Tetwasobola kutuuka ku mubeezi w’eddoboozi. Kebera omukutu gwo, olwo ddamu ogezeeko oba genda mu maaso nga tolina mukutu.
errors.genericVoice: Waliwo ekyasalako okuyita mu ddoboozi. Gezaako nate, oba genda mu maaso ne munno atali ku mukutu.

ios.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: VeryLoving yeetaaga okuyingira mu mayirofooni olw’obukuumi n’okukuba essimu AI omubeezi.
ios.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: VeryLoving ekozesa ekifo kyo ku maapu y’obukuumi n’ebintu eby’obukuumi ebiriraanyewo.
ios.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: VeryLoving ekozesa Bluetooth okuyunga ku by’okwewunda byo NorthStar eby’obukuumi.
ios.NSCameraUsageDescription: VeryLoving uses the camera only to scan the one-time pairing QR code on your home robot.

releaseCritical.authUnavailable: Enkola eno ey’okuyingira teri mu nkyusa eno.
releaseCritical.demoModeNotice: Enkola ya demo ekozesa data ey’obulimba eterekeddwa ku kyuma kyokka. Empeereza eziyungiddwa tezinnakakasibwa, era olutuula luno lutandikibwa bupya app bw’eddamu okutikkibwa.
releaseCritical.authCodeInvalid: Koodi y’okukakasa si ntuufu oba eggwaako. Saba koodi empya oddemu ogezeeko.
releaseCritical.authRateLimited: Ogezezzaako okuyingira emirundi mingi. Lindako katono, olyoke oddemu ogezeeko.
releaseCritical.authTimeout: Okukakasa okuyingira kututte ekiseera kiwanvu nnyo. Kebera omukutu gwo oddemu ogezeeko.
releaseCritical.authNetwork: Tetusoose kutuuka ku mpeereza y’okuyingira. Kebera omukutu gwo oddemu ogezeeko.
releaseCritical.mapUnavailable: Maapu y’obukuumi tesobodde kutikkibwa. Kebera omukutu gwo oddemu ogezeeko.
releaseCritical.mapCachedLocation: Ekifo ky’oli kati tekirabika. Tukulaga ekifo kyo ekyasembayo okuterekebwa ku %{capturedAt}.
releaseCritical.locationShareFailed: Tetusoose kugabana kifo kyo. Kebera olukusa lw’ekifo oddemu ogezeeko.
releaseCritical.locationShareCurrent: Kino kye kifo kyange ekyawandiikiddwa ku %{capturedAt}:
releaseCritical.locationShareCached: Kino kye kifo kyange ekyasembayo okuterekebwa, ekyawandiikiddwa ku %{capturedAt}:
releaseCritical.blePermission: Olukusa lwa Bluetooth luggaddwa. Luggule mu Nteekateeka, oddemu ogezeeko.
releaseCritical.bleUnavailable: Okuyunga ku Bluetooth tekuli ku kyuma kino oba mu nkyusa eno.
releaseCritical.bleScanFailed: Tetusoose kuzuula NorthStar. Gikuumire kumpi, kebera Bluetooth, oddemu ogezeeko.
releaseCritical.bleNoDevices: Tewali byuma bya NorthStar bizuuliddwa kumpi. Gikuumire kumpi oddemu okunoonya.
releaseCritical.bleConnectFailed: Tetusoose kuyunga ku NorthStar. Gikuumire ng’erimu omuliro era nga eri kumpi, oddemu ogezeeko.
releaseCritical.savePlaceFailed: Tetusoose kutereka kifo kino. Ddamu ogezeeko.
releaseCritical.sosDialerOpened: Eky’okukubirako essimu kigguddwa; okukuba essimu tekukakasiddwa.
releaseCritical.sosContactRequired: Tewali muntu wa mbeera ya mangu abaddewo; tewali ssimu yakubiddwa.
releaseCritical.sosDialerFailed: Eky’okukubirako essimu tekisobodde kugguka; tewali ssimu yakubiddwa.
releaseCritical.sosUnknown: Okugezaako kwa SOS okwasembayo tekusobodde kukakasibwa.
releaseCritical.voiceConfiguration: Omuyambi ow’eddoboozi taliwo kati. Ddamu ogezeeko oluvannyuma oba weeyongere n’omuyambi atalina mukutu.
releaseCritical.editContactTitle: Kyusa omuntu ow’omu mbeera ya mangu
releaseCritical.contactUpdated: Omuntu ow’omu mbeera ya mangu akyusiddwa.

medicalProfile.title: Emergency medical profile
medicalProfile.subtitle: Information you choose to share during an SOS
medicalProfile.description: Keep this information current. VeryLoving attaches it only to a connected SOS after you enable sharing; it is not sent through the phone call itself.
medicalProfile.conditionsHint: Enter one per line or separate items with commas.
medicalProfile.allergiesHint: Enter one per line or separate items with commas.
medicalProfile.medicationsHint: Enter one per line: name | dose | instructions.
medicalProfile.emergencyNotesHint: Add details that may help your emergency contacts.
medicalProfile.shareLabel: Include this profile with connected SOS alerts
medicalProfile.shareHint: When enabled, reviewed details may be sent to your synchronized emergency flow.
medicalProfile.consentBody: Saving with sharing enabled records your consent and review time. You can turn sharing off or clear this profile at any time.
medicalProfile.saved: Medical profile saved and review time recorded.
medicalProfile.loadFailed: We could not load your medical profile. Try again.
medicalProfile.saveFailed: We could not save your medical profile. Check the entries and try again.
medicalProfile.clearFailed: We could not clear your medical profile. Try again.
medicalProfile.clearMessage: This removes the emergency medical information stored securely on this device.

medication.title: Medication reminders
medication.subtitle: Schedule home robot reminders and caregiver escalation.
medication.referenceHint: Use a short private schedule reference with letters, numbers, hyphens, or underscores.
medication.noRobot: Pair a home robot before adding medication reminders.
medication.escalationHint: Caregivers are alerted only if the reminder remains unacknowledged.
medication.saveFailed: We could not save this medication reminder. Check the entries and try again.
medication.loadFailed: We could not load medication reminders. Try again.
medication.acknowledgeFailed: We could not acknowledge this medication reminder. Try again.

wellness.title: Wellbeing & connected care
wellness.subtitle: Gentle activities, emotional check-ins, and coordinated device support.
wellness.connectedCareUnavailable: Connected care needs a signed-in account and the VeryLoving service. Local activities and mood history still work on this device.
wellness.scenarioFailed: Connected care could not start or update. Check your connection and try again.

cognitive.title: Cognitive engagement
cognitive.subtitle: Choose a light memory game, a trivia question, or a conversation prompt.
cognitive.connectedBody: Ask your home companion to start a gentle activity and follow its progress here.
cognitive.connectedHint: Starts the cognitive engagement scenario on your account-bound devices.
cognitive.activitySubtitle: There is no score to chase. Pick what feels comfortable today.
cognitive.emptyMessage: Memory, trivia, and conversation are ready whenever you are.

memory.title: Memory cards
memory.description: Notice three symbols, then recall the middle one.

trivia.title: Friendly trivia
trivia.description: Answer a familiar question at your own pace.

conversation.title: Conversation prompt
conversation.description: Use a warm prompt to recall and share a story.

memory.title: Remember the middle symbol
memory.instruction: Take a moment to look at this sequence.
memory.question: Which symbol was in the middle?
memory.incorrect: Good try. Take another look and go at your own pace.

trivia.title: Friendly trivia
trivia.incorrect: Not this time—and that is completely okay.

one.prompt: What color is a clear daytime sky?

two.prompt: What is the largest organ of the human body?

three.prompt: How many days are in a week?

prompts.one: What is a meal that brings back a happy memory?
prompts.two: Who taught you something you still use today?
prompts.three: What song always lifts your mood?
prompts.four: What is a place you would enjoy visiting again?

emotional.title: Emotional check-in
emotional.subtitle: Notice how you feel, save a short reflection, or invite your companion to talk.
emotional.moodQuestion: How are you feeling right now?
emotional.moodHint: Choose the closest answer. There is no wrong choice.
emotional.reflectionHint: Keep it brief. Raw voice audio and transcripts are not saved here.
emotional.reflectionPlaceholder: A few words about this moment...
emotional.privacyNote: Your mood history is account-bound, included in privacy export, and removed with account data deletion.
emotional.saveFailed: We could not save this check-in. Please try again.
emotional.connectedBody: Start a consent-aware Hume conversation through your home companion. A user-started check-in never invents a stress reading.
emotional.connectedHint: Starts an emotional check-in on your account-bound home companion.
emotional.historySubtitle: Only your last 90 private check-ins are retained on this device.
emotional.historyLoadFailed: We could not load your check-in history.
emotional.historyEmptyMessage: Choose a mood above when you are ready.
emotional.deleteMessage: This removes the mood and short reflection from this device.
emotional.deleteFailed: We could not delete this check-in. Please try again.
emotional.humeContextNotice: When you start reflection, your selected mood and optional summary are shared as temporary Hume context. They are not treated as a stress reading.

scenarios.title: Connected care scenarios
scenarios.subtitle: Coordinate your wearable and home companion with clear safety boundaries.
scenarios.connectedCareBody: VeryLoving resolves your paired devices on the server, prevents duplicate actions, and tracks every execution.
scenarios.demoOffline: Demo mode never creates a bearer token, so connected scenarios stay offline. Sign in with a real development account to test the server flow.
scenarios.signInRequired: Sign in again to use connected care scenarios.
scenarios.notConfigured: Connected care is not configured in this build.
scenarios.networkError: The connected care service could not be reached. Your wearable can still work over Bluetooth.
scenarios.stillRunning: This scenario is still running. Refresh its status shortly.
scenarios.genericError: The connected care action could not be completed. Please retry.
scenarios.chooseActionBody: Actions with safety consequences always explain what will happen before they start.

descriptions.fall_detection: Run an analytics-only practice. It never moves a robot or alerts a contact.
descriptions.medication_adherence: Ask the robot to remind you now; unconfirmed reminders can escalate to a caregiver.
descriptions.emotional_check_in: Invite a calming, consent-aware Hume conversation.
descriptions.cognitive_engagement: Invite a gentle robot activity and voice game.
descriptions.ai_angel_auto_dial: Start the confirmed cross-device emergency flow.

confirmations.practiceBody: This records a practice event only. It will not move the robot, call anyone, or send an emergency alert.
confirmations.medicationBody: The robot will remind you now. If you do not confirm within the adherence window, the configured caregiver escalation can run.
confirmations.emergencyBody: This starts the real emergency workflow across your paired devices and may contact your configured emergency contact.
confirmations.cancelCriticalBody: Stopping a critical scenario can end active emergency steps. Continue only if you are sure help is no longer needed.

scenarios.wellnessToolsBody: Check in privately or choose an activity before involving connected devices.
scenarios.recentActivityBody: Status is encrypted, account-bound, and refreshed while work is active.
scenarios.emptyMessage: Start a wellbeing check-in or another quick action when you are ready.
scenarios.started: Scenario accepted. Live status is updating.
scenarios.fallbackNote: A planned fallback completed because a preferred step was unavailable.
scenarios.failedNote: The scenario could not finish. Check device connectivity and try again if it is safe.

feedback.title: Was this helpful?
feedback.message: Tell us whether %{interaction} supported you. We save only the rating, not a free-text response.
feedback.helpfulHint: Records a thumbs-up rating for this completed interaction.
feedback.notHelpfulHint: Records a thumbs-down rating for this completed interaction.
feedback.error: We could not save your rating. Please try again.
